description: Solutions known to trigger EDR false positives (CrowdStrike Falcon, SentinelOne, Carbon Black etc.). These contain adversary simulation, red team, or pentesting content whose analytics rules reference known malicious tool names, hashes, or attack patterns that EDR products flag as threat indicators.

solutions.name: BloodHound Enterprise
solutions.reason: AD attack-path recon tool -- analytics rules reference BloodHound tool hashes and attack patterns

solutions.name: FalconFriday
solutions.reason: Red team detection content -- references offensive security tool signatures

solutions.name: Attacker Tools Threat Protection
solutions.reason: References known offensive tools (Mimikatz, Cobalt Strike, etc.) by name and hash

solutions.name: MITRE ATT&CK
solutions.reason: May reference known tool hashes and attack technique indicators
